title: crush.lu is live
hero_summary: After months of quiet building, crush.lu opens its doors in Luxembourg.

title: Speaking your language
hero_summary: Full English, French, and German support across the whole experience.

title: Your event ticket, in your pocket
hero_summary: Apple Wallet and Google Wallet passes for every event — tap to enter, no scrambling at the door.

title: Sign in with LuxID
hero_summary: Your Luxembourg national ID, now a one-tap way to join crush.lu.

title: Send a Crush Spark
hero_summary: A lightweight way to let someone know you’d like to connect after an event.

title: We rebuilt how crush.lu finds your people
hero_summary: Qualities, defects, and a touch of astrology — a richer way to match.

title: Quiz Night, live
hero_summary: A real-time team quiz with table rotations, live scoring, and a projector view for the host.

title: A week of small, careful improvements
hero_summary: Mobile layouts, translations, and dozens of quiet fixes across the app.
